---
title: "Bagaev_scores"
author: "Daniel Schulz"
date: "2026-07-03"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# scoring with singscore
Score each RNA patient on the 29 Bagaev functional gene expression signatures
using singscore (rank-based, single-sample; no maxRank cutoff issue).
Output: data/processed/rna_scores.rds
  data/processed/gene_signatures_Bagaev.csv
  figures/02_rna_scores_heatmap_Bagaev.pdf

```{r}
library(singscore)
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)
library(tidyverse)

OUT     <- "/mnt/immucan_volume/processed_data/NSCLC2_cohort/Figures/scores_for_sharing"
FIGURES <- "/mnt/immucan_volume/processed_data/NSCLC2_cohort/Figures/Revision/"

rna_mat <- readRDS(file.path(OUT, "rna_mat.rds"))

# ── Load Bagaev signatures ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
df <- read_xlsx(
  "/mnt/immucan_volume/processed_data/NSCLC2_cohort/data/RNASeq/annotations/Bagaev_FGES.xlsx",
  sheet = 1, skip = 1)

df <- df %>%
  select(-ID) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -`Process/Signature`) %>%
  select(-name) %>%
  filter(!is.na(value))

colnames(df) <- c("name", "gene")

signatures <- split(df$gene, df$name)

cat("Loaded", length(signatures), "Bagaev signatures\n")
cat("Signature sizes:\n"); print(sapply(signatures, length))

# Export gene list (long format)
sig_df  <- do.call(rbind, lapply(names(signatures), function(nm)
  data.frame(name = nm, gene = signatures[[nm]], stringsAsFactors = FALSE)))
write.csv(sig_df, file.path(OUT, "gene_signatures_Bagaev.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

# ── Diagnostic: gene overlap per signature ────────────────────────────────────
# rankGenes() requires genes × patients orientation
rna_for_score <- if (ncol(rna_mat) > nrow(rna_mat)) t(rna_mat) else rna_mat

cat("\nGene overlap between signatures and RNA matrix:\n")
overlap <- sapply(signatures, function(g) sum(g %in% rownames(rna_for_score)))
total   <- sapply(signatures, length)
rownames(rna_for_score)[grepl(paste(signatures$`EMT signature`, collapse = "|"),rownames(rna_for_score))]
print(data.frame(found = overlap, total = total, pct = round(100 * overlap / total)))

# ── Score with singscore ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ranked <- rankGenes(rna_for_score)

scores_list <- lapply(names(signatures), function(nm) {
  sc <- simpleScore(ranked, upSet = signatures[[nm]], centerScore = TRUE)
  setNames(sc$TotalScore, rownames(sc))
})
rna_scores <- as.data.frame(do.call(cbind, scores_list))
colnames(rna_scores) <- names(signatures)
rownames(rna_scores) <- colnames(rna_for_score)

cat("\nRNA scores:", nrow(rna_scores), "patients ×", ncol(rna_scores), "axes\n")

saveRDS(rna_scores, file.path(OUT, "rna_scores.rds"))
cat("Saved rna_scores.rds\n")

```

```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=15}
# ── Diagnostic heatmap ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
score_z  <- t(scale(as.matrix(rna_scores)))   # axes × patients

col_fun <- colorRamp2(c(-2, 0, 2), c("#2166AC", "white", "#B2182B"))

ht <- Heatmap(
  score_z,
  name               = "z-score",
  col                = col_fun,
  cluster_columns    = hclust(dist(t(score_z), method = "euclidean"), method = "ward.D2"),
  cluster_rows       = hclust(dist(score_z,    method = "euclidean"), method = "ward.D2"),
  show_column_names  = FALSE,
  row_names_side     = "left",
  row_names_gp       = gpar(fontsize = 9),
  column_title       = paste0("Bagaev RNA scores  (n=", ncol(score_z), " patients)"),
  column_title_gp    = gpar(fontsize = 12),
  heatmap_legend_param = list(title = "z-score\n(per axis)")
)

pdf(file.path(FIGURES, "02_rna_scores_heatmap_Bagaev.pdf"), width = 14, height = 7)
draw(ht)
dev.off()
cat("Heatmap saved\n")
```

# patient clusters
```{r}

pat_clus <- cutree(hclust(dist(t(score_z), method = "euclidean"), method = "ward.D2"), k = 4)

traits <- read_csv("/mnt/immucan_volume/processed_data/NSCLC2_cohort/Figures/scores_for_sharing/all_traits.csv")

traits$pat_clus <- as.factor(pat_clus[traits$immucan_id])
cur_traits <- as.data.frame(traits) %>% filter(!is.na(pat_clus))
survminer::ggforest(survival::coxph( Surv(time_to_event, censoring) ~  pat_clus ,data = cur_traits))
as.data.frame(traits) %>% filter(!is.na(pat_clus), LUAD_vs_LUSC == "Adenocarcinoma") %>% count(pat_clus)

surv_fit <- survival::survfit(Surv(time_to_event, censoring) ~ pat_clus, data = cur_traits )

p <- survminer::ggsurvplot(surv_fit, data = cur_traits, risk.table = TRUE, pval = TRUE)

p <- cowplot::plot_grid(p$plot,p$table,ncol = 1, rel_heights = c(1,0.5))
p
```

```{r, fig.height=10, fig.width=10}
# ── Diagnostic heatmap ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
cor_mat  <- cor(as.matrix(rna_scores), use = "pairwise.complete.obs", method = "pearson")
dist_mat <- 1 - cor_mat                      # distance score: 0 = identical, 2 = anti-correlated

feature_clust <- hclust(as.dist(dist_mat), method = "ward.D2")

col_fun <- colorRamp2(c(0, 1, 2), c("#B2182B", "white", "#2166AC"))

ht <- Heatmap(
  dist_mat,
  name                 = "1 - r",
  col                  = col_fun,
  cluster_rows         = feature_clust,
  cluster_columns      = feature_clust,
  show_row_names       = TRUE,
  show_column_names    = TRUE,
  row_names_side       = "left",
  row_names_gp         = gpar(fontsize = 9),
  column_names_gp      = gpar(fontsize = 9),
  column_title         = paste0("Bagaev RNA score feature correlation (n=", nrow(rna_scores), " patients)"),
  column_title_gp      = gpar(fontsize = 12),
  cell_fun             = function(j, i, x, y, w, h, fill) {
    grid.text(sprintf("%.2f", dist_mat[i, j]), x, y, gp = gpar(fontsize = 7))
  },
  heatmap_legend_param = list(title = "distance\n(1 - r)")
)
ht
pdf(file.path(FIGURES, "02_rna_scores_heatmap_Bagaev.pdf"), width = 14, height = 7)
draw(ht)
dev.off()
cat("Heatmap saved\n")
```
